steps.title: Find the expected 2013 to 2014 percent increase
steps.content: The 5% increase was double the next increase, so the expected 2013 to 2014 increase was $5\% \div 2=2.5\%$.

steps.title: Apply the increase to the 2013 value
steps.content:
A 2.5% increase means multiply by $1.025$:
$$6,720(1.025)=6,888$$
That matches Choice B — 6,888.
